name: @filepad/agent-access-public-repo
description: Public Agent Access SDK and remote MCP pairing packages for Filepad.

scripts.pack:check: pnpm -C packages/agent-access-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/claude-code-hooks build && pnpm -C packages/mcp-server build && pnpm -C packages/agent-connect build && pnpm -C packages/guardian build && pnpm -C packages/runtime-adapter-claude-code build && pnpm pack:check:sdk && pnpm pack:check:claude-code-hooks && pnpm pack:check:mcp-server && pnpm pack:check:agent-connect && pnpm pack:check:guardian && pnpm pack:check:runtime-adapter-claude-code
scripts.validate:agent-access: pnpm check:agent-public-boundary && pnpm typecheck:agent-sdk && pnpm test:sdk && pnpm typecheck:claude-code-hooks && pnpm test:claude-code-hooks && pnpm typecheck:mcp-server && pnpm test:mcp-server && pnpm typecheck:agent-connect && pnpm test:agent-connect && pnpm typecheck:guardian && pnpm test:guardian && pnpm typecheck:runtime-adapter-claude-code && pnpm test:runtime-adapter-claude-code
scripts.validate:agent-access:release: pnpm validate:agent-access && pnpm pack:check && pnpm proof:clean-install
